Describe the sequence of visual events regarding the personnel and aircraft shown throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, three men in military caps stand together; at 4s, four men in leather flight jackets appear; at 6s, a person climbs a metal ladder structure; at 10s, a twin-engine bomber aircraft is shown with text overlay; at 18s, people stand near the aircraft on the deck.
